line_description: A single dark, teardrop-shaped glyph (resembling a punctum or comma-like mark) positioned in the upper portion of the line, slightly left of center, with no accompanying Latin text or numerical content.

unmatched_vision_glyphs.description: A small, dark, teardrop or comma-shaped mark with a rounded bulbous top and a tapered lower tail pointing slightly to the right; resembles a medieval musical punctum or a single calligraphic punctuation glyph; appears as a solid filled black shape with slightly irregular organic contours against a blank background.
unmatched_vision_glyphs.unicode_codepoint_candidate: U+22C5 (dot operator) or U+066B (Arabic decimal separator)
